name: Monsters Prison
description:
A Sign:
  By the power of Poseidon,the god of gods,this cruel creatures now are here:
          Seamon & Seagora who mutiled body of thousands.
          Godzila who bring pain, agony e suffer to all lands in this world. 
Sacifices are avaliable only when ground shakes and the terrible roars begins.

exits.description: A landing is north of you.
